race.description: Ipswich Party Hire Colts, Geldings & Entires Hcp (58)
race.comment: YES I'M UGLY (9) produced a good effort to finish runner-up over 1350m here two starts ago then raced wide and was not competitive at Toowoomba last start. Goes well at this shorter journey. Can be a bit hot and cold - banking on the application of blinkers for the first time today getting him to switch on. MAJESTIC LOUVRE (6) raced handy and boxed on well for third when resuming over this trip at Beaudesert recently. In the mix with a repeat of that performance. I STOLE IT (2) is back after a five-month spell. Often needs a run or two but his two trials leading into this have been promising. Good each-way hope out of gate one. CALMER KARMA (1) kept the good form rolling at Dalby last time. Takes on a better field but should feature again. Last start Dalby winner COINCIDE (3) will find this a bit harder but isn't out of calculations.
